title: Vintage Filmstrip Collage Of A Woman
sourceTitle: Image To Image Netflix Style Vintage Filmstrip Memory Collage AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image vintage filmstrip memory collage using uploaded reference portrait before vintage filmstrip memory collage transformation, preserving same young woman from the uploaded reference image with maximum face consistency. Subject: same young woman from the uploaded reference image keeps exact facial identity, facial structure, eye shape, nose, lips, hairstyle influence, skin tone, age, and overall appearance across every memory frame. Scene: joyful laughter while walking, dreamy window gaze, fixing hair in the mirror, holding coffee, and gentle candid close-up smile appear as a rolling timeline of memories with soft authentic emotions, clean vibrant styling, youthful sweetness, energetic charm, and premium Korean editorial mood. Composition: Ultra-realistic IMAX-level Netflix-style film memory collage portrait, fresh realistic portrait photography, premium Korean editorial aesthetic, soft bright natural lighting, and rich cinematic timeline storytelling. arranged in an artistic asymmetrical 9:16 vertical composition, with overlapping film frames, contact-sheet strips, transparent negatives, realistic film-border details, subtle grain, and sharp face detail in every panel. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image netflix style vintage filmstrip memory collage source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Film Layout: overlapping film frames, contact-sheet strips, and transparent negatives forming an asymmetrical rolling timeline. Style: Ultra-realistic IMAX-level Netflix-style film memory collage portrait, fresh realistic portrait photography, premium Korean editorial aesthetic, soft bright natural lighting, and rich cinematic timeline storytelling. Color Palette: Creamy skin tones, fresh pastel highlights, soft daylight whites, clean neutrals, subtle warm accents, and realistic film-strip blacks. Lighting: Soft bright natural front lighting with diffused glow across the face, consistent panel lighting, gentle skin refinement, and clear facial readability across all film frames. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
